title: Baseline
description: A minimal set of mods which serves as a baseline for 1.21+ modpacks
body: The main goal of this pack is to create a solid baseline of mods that can be used in all future modpacks I make on 1.21 or later. It comes with fairly standard set of performance/bugfix mods and some unintrusive quality of life mods. I really want to avoid any potentional future mod conflicts, so some "experimental" mods (such as C2ME) have been left out for now but may be added in the future.
